transcript.text: Hello, living in Lafayette, V-LOG, the 6th of June, 2013.

And my mom, like, wasn't even in town, she was rolling in town at like 8.
So I don't know why she invited to have barbecue yesterday, she was just coming today.
But, yeah, we got some pizzas and some beers.
But I was working most of the day. I was working until my mom got there.
So I was working until, you know, only like the last couple hours.
And then I went home and worked on the couch and then in bed until like 4 in the morning again, my total night hour.
I didn't get up until like noon.
And then, oh no, no, no, no, I worked until like 10 or 11 and then I slept until 1 and then I worked from 1 to 5.30.
And then I slept until noon.
So, then I got up and mowed my friend's lawn just now, a nice sunny day.
It's cool to have a little bit of exercise, get some sun.
I think I'm going to start riding my bike again on the inside while I work because I'm going to start working,
Attaching the CSS to all the different things on the, you know, the vertical timeline.
Which will take two to three weeks just to do that.
I think, you know, it'll make it look better, looking more polished, you know.
And then I can, after that, well, and after that I'm going to finish the explanation page.

Different countries having battles and stuff.
So, yeah, I'm going to start riding my bike while I work on that.
